overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through neon-lit urban streets and narrow alleys in a futuristic Asian-inspired city district at night. The environment features a mix of traditional Japanese architectural elements with cyberpunk neon signage and futuristic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with elevated highway

events.description: turns right from open street into narrow covered alley with red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit street, passing the HOテル and pawn shop signs while approaching the alley entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction along the street

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with Japanese text reading HOテル mounted on building facade
yellow rectangular sign with black text reading EL DORADO PAWN SHOP
massive concrete highway structure with red lighting underneath spanning across the background
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging in a string across the alley entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by the blue neon HOテル sign and yellow pawn shop signage. The camera follows the character walking forward along the wet asphalt street toward a narrow alley entrance decorated with red paper lanterns, passing under an elevated highway overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with food vendors and neon signage

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow alleyway, passing various storefronts and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: character in green jacket and red hat walking toward the camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: green neon sign reading Dino's Diner with retro styling mounted on the right wall
large vertical digital screen displaying an advertisement with a gorilla image
small food vendor stall with illuminated menu displays and serving counter

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, covered alleyway lined with neon signs including Dino's Diner and various digital billboards. Red paper lanterns hang overhead as the character passes a food stall on the left, encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction through the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with small shrine and ambient lighting

events.description: passing from neon-lit area to warmer candle-lit shrine area with steam effects

agents.ego_description: walking past a small shrine area with burning candles and steam vents, observing the ambient atmosphere

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit standing and looking at a phone near the shrine area

entered.detail: small outdoor shrine with multiple burning candles and offerings emitting warm orange light
steam or smoke rising from floor vents creating atmospheric haze in the alley
single small tree growing in the alleyway surrounded by the built environment

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the narrow alley, the lighting shifts to a warmer glow from a small shrine with burning candles on the right. Steam rises from floor vents creating atmospheric haze as the character passes a person standing near the shrine, with paper lanterns still visible hanging overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with burning barrel

events.description: turns left at the end of the alley into a darker corridor with a burning barrel
exits the dark corridor back into the neon-lit area near the pawn shop

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn into a darker service corridor, passing a burning barrel with NPCs nearby

notable_agents.action: two characters standing near the burning barrel in the dark corridor

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside providing warm orange light in the dark corridor
large industrial HVAC unit with spinning fans mounted on the wall
metal roll-down security shutters covering storefronts in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a darker, industrial service corridor illuminated by a burning barrel. The environment shifts to concrete surfaces with security shutters and ventilation equipment. After passing the barrel and a couple of NPCs, the character emerges back toward the familiar pawn shop area.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with large industrial fans and vending machines

events.description: passes the pawn shop again and turns into a new alley with large ventilation fans

agents.ego_description: walking past the pawn shop entrance again and proceeding into an alley lined with industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: character in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive wall-mounted industrial ventilation fans with green housing spinning slowly
futuristic vending machine with illuminated product display

segments.scene_description: The character loops back past the EL DORADO PAWN SHOP and turns into a different narrow alley characterized by massive industrial ventilation fans on the left wall. The alley features vending machines and various digital signage as the character continues forward toward a street exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: exits the narrow alley onto a wider main street with parked cars and more pedestrians
crosses the street between parked vehicles including a distinctive pink sports car

agents.ego_description: exiting the alley and crossing the main street, navigating between parked cars and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in green shirt walking across the street in front of the pink car

entered.detail: bright pink futuristic sports car parked on the street side
yellow plastic construction barriers blocking part of the street
multi-story commercial buildings with various neon signs and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley onto a wider main street featuring a distinctive pink sports car parked on the right. The environment opens up with more pedestrians and yellow barricades visible as the character crosses the street between parked vehicles toward another covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping walkway with diner and posters

events.description: enters a covered pedestrian walkway with the SPHERE diner sign visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway passing other pedestrians and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: two women walking toward the camera, one in white jacket and red pants, another in yellow top

entered.detail: red and yellow sign reading SPHERE mounted above a diner entrance
large poster featuring a gorilla face with text PURE OVER on the left wall
stack of cardboard boxes placed against the wall near the poster

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character entering a covered pedestrian walkway marked by the SPHERE diner sign on the right. The walkway features large advertising posters including a gorilla image on the left, cardboard boxes, and green stools outside establishments. The character continues forward through this semi-enclosed commercial space as other pedestrians pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district, transitioning from open city streets into a series of claustrophobic alleys before emerging back into a bustling commercial thoroughfare. It begins on a wet asphalt street beneath an elevated highway, moving past blue and yellow neon signage toward a narrow alley entrance adorned with red paper lanterns. As the camera enters the confined space, the environment shifts from the glow of digital billboards and food stalls to a warmer, atmospheric haze created by steam vents and a candle-lit shrine. The scene then turns into a dark industrial corridor marked by a burning barrel and concrete security shutters before looping back past a pawn shop and through another alley dominated by massive ventilation fans. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wider main street featuring a pink sports car and yellow barricades, eventually gliding into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with large advertising posters and green stools.
